recommendations.title: Offender
recommendations.overview: Justice needs to be served at Britain's most notorious young offenders institute.

recommendations.title: Our Father
recommendations.overview: Two young boys, Valerio and Christian, form a powerful friendship over the summer.

recommendations.title: Casting JonBenet
recommendations.overview: Twenty years after the modern world's most notorious child murder, the legacy of the crime and its impact are explored.

recommendations.title: Collision
recommendations.overview: Over the course of one fateful day, a corrupt businessman and his socialite wife race to save their daughter from a notorious crime lord.

recommendations.title: V for Vendetta
recommendations.overview: In a world in which Great Britain has become a fascist state, a masked vigilante known only as “V” conducts guerrilla warfare against the oppressive British government. When V rescues a young woman from the secret police, he finds in her an ally with

recommendations.title: SK1
recommendations.overview: The hunt, capture and trial of Guy Georges, one of France's most notorious serial killers.

recommendations.title: King of Devil's Island
recommendations.overview: Norwegian winter, 1915. On the island Bastøy, outside Oslo, a group of young boys aged 11 to 18, are held in an institution for delinquent youth, notorious for its sadistic regime.  One day a new boy, Erling, arrives, determined to escape from the is

recommendations.title: 7 Prisoners
recommendations.overview: An impoverished teen seeking to escape the clutches of a human trafficker must weigh living up to his moral code against his struggle to survive.

recommendations.title: Killer Heat
recommendations.overview: An expat PI is hired to investigate a suspicious death in Crete, Greece, where jealousies run deep amongst the victim's powerful family.

recommendations.title: Bullhead
recommendations.overview: A young  cattle farmer is approached by an unscrupulous veterinarian to make a shady deal with a notorious beef trader.
